Home›Services› Penetration Testing Services
Red Team

Penetration Testing
Services

Manual exploitation by certified penetration testers across networks, web applications, cloud infrastructure, APIs, and wireless environments — not just automated scans.

Find Your Vulnerabilities Before Attackers Do

Automated vulnerability scanners miss what skilled adversaries find. Our penetration testers combine manual exploitation techniques with deep infrastructure knowledge to identify critical security gaps that tools alone cannot detect. Every finding is verified, exploited where safe to do so, and documented with clear evidence.

Penetration Testing Types

  • External network penetration testing — perimeter, firewall, and exposed services
  • Internal network penetration testing — lateral movement, privilege escalation, domain compromise
  • Web application security testing (OWASP Top 10 + beyond)
  • Cloud infrastructure assessment (AWS, Azure, GCP misconfigurations)
  • API security testing — authentication, authorization, injection flaws
  • Wireless network penetration testing
  • Mobile application security assessment (iOS and Android)
  • Social engineering and physical security assessments

Engagement Methodology

Every engagement follows a structured methodology based on PTES (Penetration Testing Execution Standard) and OWASP standards — covering reconnaissance, scanning, exploitation, post-exploitation, and reporting. We provide detailed findings reports including evidence screenshots, exploit chains, risk ratings, and remediation guidance prioritized by business impact, not just CVSS score.

Compliance-Aligned Testing

Our penetration testing engagements satisfy requirements under CMMC Level 2, NIST 800-53, PCI DSS, SOC 2, HIPAA, and ISO 27001. We issue letters of attestation and can participate in client audit conversations to confirm scope and methodology.

Testing Scope

  • Network & Infrastructure
  • Web Applications
  • Cloud Environments
  • APIs
  • Wireless Networks
  • Mobile Apps

Compliance Alignment

  • CMMC Level 2
  • NIST 800-53
  • PCI DSS
  • SOC 2 Type II
  • ISO 27001
  • HIPAA

Request a Scoping Call

We scope every engagement to your specific environment and objectives — no cookie-cutter packages.

Schedule Scoping Call 301-352-4855
